components.name: header
components.purification: Removed Bootstrap classes, custom script dependencies, and multi-level dropdowns. Replaced with pure flexbox and MD3-themed buttons.

components.name: hero_split
components.purification: Extracted editorial-style typography sizes and dark ambient background gradients. Integrated a native HTML/MD3 checkboxes card to drive the Yes-Ladder commitment loop. Eliminated video background wrappers.

components.name: features_bento
components.purification: Merged bloated feature and benefit listings into a unified CSS Grid Bento Layout. Removed animate.css library, replacing it with pure CSS transform hover glows.

components.name: services_accordion
components.purification: Completely removed jQuery, nice-select, and Bootstrap collapse. Replaced with native HTML details/summary or a lightweight semantic markup driven by CSS transitions.

components.name: testimonials_slider
components.purification: Removed Swiper.js, custom pagination scripts, and main-image sync functions. Implemented pure CSS Scroll Snap with horizontal overflow.

components.name: pricing_cards
components.purification: Refactored the bootstrap column layout to CSS Flexbox. Changed hourly pricing models into 'Value Stacks' to eliminate micro-billing friction, aligning with Conversion Psychology guidelines.

components.name: qualification_wizard
components.purification: Standardized the lead intake wizard to use native MD3 outlines, adding budget threshold validations and strict error formatting.

components.name: faq_accordion
components.purification: Replaced Bootstrap collapse divs with semantic HTML `<details>` and `<summary>` tags for native screen-reader support.

components.name: footer
components.purification: Purged social SVG blocks and heavy font files. Simplified into a luxury text layout with MD3 text links.
